name: I'm on the engine
hints: You're standing on top of the engine. There might be something hidden here.
LOOK ENGINE carefully - there may be something concealed on or in the engine.
LOOK ENGINE finds a hidden item and automatically picks it up. DOWN returns to the engine room (room 18).
LOOK ENGINE to find and automatically get a hidden item. Then go DOWN to return to the engine room.
notes: On top of the engine, accessed by GO ENGINE from the engine room (room 18). LOOK ENGINE finds a hidden item (auto-pickup). DOWN returns to engine room (room 18).
